product.description:
About Cloversoft:
Cloversoft key mission is to create only the safest and most eco-friendly products to the community where part of the sales proceed are donated to Polar Bears International to save our polar bears.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Ethylhexyiglycerio (Vegetable Glycerin), Benzalkonium Chioride, Glycerin (Plant Derived), Triethyl Citrate (Food Grade), D-Panthenol (Plant Derived), Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate (Plant Derived), 1,3-Butylene Glycol (Plant Derived), Organic Aloe Barbadensis Extract & Chamomilla Recutita Extract
metaData.Key Information:
Cloversoft Pets Plant-Based Daily Pet Bathe Wipes!

Specially formulated for furry pets for safe & effective fur cleaning, Cloversoft Pets Plant-Based Daily Pet Bathe Wipes is perfect for Rinse-Free Showers after walks and to prevent flaky skin, matted fur and any dirt after a day of fun outdoors.

• 100% Unbleached Bamboo Pulp – Eco-friendly plant-based goodness for you, your furkid, and our earth
• 99.9% Antibacterial Efficacy – To keep your furkid germ-free and safe
• 50% More Organic Aloe Vera – To keep your furkid’s fur clean and comfy, free from dirt and grime
• 0% Parabens & Harsh Chemicals – Zero nasties for your peace of mind and for a happy healthy furkid!
• Vegan & Cruelty-Free – No animal testing or harmful substances!
• Suitable for All Fur & Skin Types – All-inclusive and perfect for furkids of all breeds and sizes!

Pack Size: 70 sheets per pack
Sheet Size: 200 x 200mm

Let Me Pamper Your Dog or Cat!
After an adventure with your furkid, wipe down your furkid from head to tail 2-3 tims with one wipe. Repeat this 2-3 more times for optimal cleaning of fur and skin. End off the session by cleaning your furkid’s paws, and enjoy a cuddle session with your clean & happy furkid.

metaData.Ingredients:
Less Than 5% Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactants, Oxygen-Based Bleaching Agents. Sodium Benzoate
Distributions
metaData.Key Information:
• Powerfully cleans up the most stubborn pet stains and odours while being safe for use around pets
• Specially formulated to be tough on urine, vomit, faeces as well as muddy paw prints
• Penetrates deep to lift all messes, leaving hygienically clean carpets
• Integrated 2-in-1 brush turns stain removal & deep cleaning into light work
metaData.Preparation:
• Open the bottle, pierce a 2 mm hole in seal. Screw on brush.
• Remove loose surface dirt. If required, vacuum surface dirt.
• Apply and work lightly into the fabric. Do not soak. Leave to work for 3 minutes.
• Completely dab off any residues with a damp light-coloured cloth. Rinse brush after use.
metaData.SAP Product Name: DR BECKMAN PET STAIN & ODOUR REMOVER TRIGGER SPRAY 650ML
metaData.Storage Information:
• Before use: test for colour fastness & material compatibility on an inconspicuous area.
• Always follow care label instructions for carpets.
• Not suitable for silk, velvet and fabrics sensitive to water.
• Store bottle in an upright position.
• Keep cleaner and its packaging away from pets.
• It is advisable that your pet is not in the same room when you clean the carpet.
• Bird owner: air the room well during and after use.

metaData.Key Information: Altimate Pet Potty Pads are 100% leakproof, highly absorbent pads infused with fresh scent for enhanced odor control. Made with Leak Proof Multilayer technology, these heavy duty pads are built to withstand overflow. The fast-drying top layer also prevents tracking, so you dont have to worry about your pup stepping into his mess. Whether you are using them for puppy training or to assist aging dogs, these pads are a great way to keep your floors clean and provide your furry friend with relief. Training Instructions: 1. Place the potty pad with the quilted side up in a designated area ( pee tray / floor ) so that your pet will be able to start using. 2. Try to encourage your pet to go to the potty pad on a regular basis. When it is time, walk your pet over to the pad and use whatever command that feels natural (i.e. ""Go potty!"", ""Do the business!""). 3.When your pet successfully uses the pad, it is vital to reward your pet with positive reinforcement and even small rewards. B

product.description:
1. Please allow a 1-3 cm error due to manual measurement. Make sure you don`t mind before ordering.
2. Please consider the difference between the photo and the actual item. Results depend on the lighting, monitor, and environment. Thank you!
3. Keep in a cool, dry place indoors, out of reach of children and pets. Avoid high temperatures and direct sunlight.
4. Do not drink. If accidentally swallowed, seek medical attention immediately.
5. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with plenty of water and seek medical advice right away.
6. Before and after use, turn the nozzle to the “ON” (“OFF”) position as indicated, and store in a place out of reach of children and infants.
7. Do not dilute or mix this product with other substances before use.
8. Do not spray directly on humans or pets, as it may cause skin or mucous membrane irritation.

metaData.Ingredients: Deodorizer, Antibacterial Agent, Ethanol, Fragrance, Purified Water.
metaData.Key Information:
•Not just covering odors, but eliminating them.
The deodorizing and antibacterial ingredients penetrate the source of odors, encapsulate bacteria, inhibit odor spread, and break down odor molecules and bacteria, thoroughly removing unpleasant smells. This helps ensure a fresh and healthy environment for your pets.
Infused with beet extract to instantly eliminate four major odor sources.
Effectively removes common pet odors such as urine smell (NH3), saliva odor (C3H9N), body odor (CH4S), and fecal odor (H2S).
Works for cats and dogs!
Just spray, let it do its magic, and enjoy a fresh, odor-free space for your pets.
SGS certified for safe use.
Our product has been tested and certified by SGS to effectively eliminate odors and bacteria.
Suitable for various occasions.
Can be sprayed on clothing, carpets, pet habitats and toys, grooming items, and toilet areas.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions for use:
1. Clean the source of the odor.
2. Spray 2–3 times from about 20 cm away.
3. Let it air dry.

metaData.Key Information: The Absorb Plus Pet Wipes can be used daily on all animals over six weeks old. They are completely natural, pH balanced, dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic, and paraben free. The extra-thick moist wipes contain only natural cleansers and conditioners, including Aloe Vera extract and Vitamin E to condition, cleanse, and moisturize and your pets coat and skin, leaving it soft and shiny. The soft wipes contain no lanolin, or alcohol and will not affect any spot-on flea control products. They can remove dirt, dander, drool, discharge, and odors from your pets dirty paws, undercoat, and bottoms. They promise to even leave your hands feeling fresh after you wipe your pet. The resealable lid ensures the biodegradable, cruelty-free wipes dont dry out too quickly.
